# Vendored frontend libs (no npm build step)

| File | Project | License | Used for |
|------|---------|---------|----------|
| lightweight-charts.standalone.production.js | TradingView Lightweight Charts v4 | Apache-2.0 | Main K-line |
| tabulator.min.js / .css | Tabulator Tables 6.3.1 | MIT | Forward log sort/filter (custom quiet theme; midnight unused) |

Do not replace LWC main chart with ECharts/TradingView commercial.
